ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the software package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and version of the last update */,
  "score" REAL /* Aggregate score or rating of the package */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was registered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the primary maintainer of the package */,
  "dependency_list" TEXT /* A list of packages that this package depends on */,
  "tags" TEXT /* A list of keywords or tags associated with the package */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* The number of times the package has been downloaded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the package is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* A description of the changes made in this version */,
  "is_release_candidate" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether this version is a release candidate */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* The type of release (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_title" TEXT /* The title of the feedback */,
  "reply" TEXT /* A reply to the feedback from the package maintainer */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the issue has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., maintainer, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user in the package (e.g., maintainer, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dependency package */,
  "version_range" TEXT /* The version range of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the release */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The date of the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES package_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_analytics" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the package */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* The number of downloads for the package */,
  "views" INTEGER /* The number of views for the package */,
  "rating" REAL /* The average rating of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)
